notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The link you entered does not exist. Please check the link or visit our

maintenance.title: The site is currently down for maintenance
maintenance.description: Sorry for any inconvenience. Please check back shortly!

unauthorized.earlyAccessThanks: Thank you for your interest in Global Nature Watch!
unauthorized.earlyAccessBody: Right now access is limited while we are in closed preview. We'd love for you to be part of what's next, so join the waitlist to be among the first to know when the tool becomes available.
unauthorized.accessDeniedBody: We were unable to verify your access to Global Nature Watch. Please try signing in again or contact support if the issue persists.
unauthorized.comingSoonBody: Thank you for creating a Global Nature Watch account. Early access is limited while we scale responsibly. You're on the waitlist, and we will email you as soon as the tool is ready.
unauthorized.failedLoadSignupDescription: Unable to check if signup is currently open. Please try again later.
